name: Sarah Johnson
bio: Dr. Johnson is an aerospace engineer with over 15 years of experience in rocket propulsion systems. She founded Saguaro Strikers to inspire the next generation of aerospace professionals.

name: Jyotishka Roy
bio: A puzzle solver and voracious reader. A passionate robotics and rocketry engineer in the making. Driven by the interest in rocketry and robotics to strive for better results guided by reliable designs & data. Keen interest in details and analyzing every small thing to make better advancements in engineering fields.
